messages.content: Write a high-signal LinkedIn post that matches the requested slice and preserves specifics.

I’ve spent the last decade at the heart of the software and AI transformation of automotive. We’ve seen how Autonomous Driving and SDVs redefined what a car can be, but as I look at manufacturing, there is still a massive Physical AI Deployment Gap. It’s trapped in "pilot purgatory" because most systems can't orchestrate and reason across the grit, heterogeneous complexity, and 24/7 pressure of a real production line. That’s why I’m thrilled to join Kerrigan Robotics as Co-Founder & CEO, and I'm deeply humbled to lead the effort Mohamad Fayez Taha (Co-Founder & CTO), Christian Cassar and Bill Rose started last year. They’ve built something truly special, and I’m excited to help them scale it. We are building the agentic AI nervous system for manufacturing - a unified layer that manages the entire automation lifecycle from design to 24/7 operations. Built on the pedigree of orchestrating thousands of robots at Tesla, we are now bringing that same industrial intelligence to our customers in the semiconductor, F&B, and automotive sectors - and we’re just getting started. I am honored to lead this team of automation veterans, and I’m grateful for the partnership of our investors at Transition Ventures, Overture Ventures, Foothill Ventures, and WovenEarth Ventures as we scale this vision. The future of manufacturing isn't just about more robots - it’s about Industrial Reasoning.

The Lovable story will be one for the history books: - Valued at $6.6B just 2 years after founding - Zero to $200M ARR in under 1 year - Only ~100 employees (!!) - Based in Stockholm, Sweden Elena Verna joined Lovable 8 months ago to lead growth, and in our in-depth conversation (her fourth visit to the pod, a record!), we discuss: 🔸 Why she's had to throw out 70% of her growth playbook at Lovable 🔸 The specific growth tactics driving Lovable’s unprecedented growth 🔸 Why giving away product is a key growth strategy in AI 🔸 Her take on Lovable's retention numbers 🔸 Why in AI you have to re-find PMF every 3 months 🔸 Whether you should join an AI startup (her honest tradeoffs) 🔸 Much more Listen now 👇 • YouTube: https://lnkd.in/gmd3xHWX • Spotify: https://lnkd.in/gtepsBrt • Apple: https://lnkd.in/gtyRHdtk Thank you to our wonderful sponsors for supporting the podcast: 🏆 WorkOS — Modern identity platform for B2B SaaS, free up to 1 million MAUs: https://workos.com/lenny 🏆 Vercel— Your collaborative AI assistant to design, iterate, and scale full-stack applications for the web: https://lnkd.in/gpSJTjmm 🏆 Persona — A global leader in digital identity verification: https://lnkd.in/gn5Y6ict
